reasoning: SPY at 707.76 — gap-downed 3.45 overnight from 711.21, now approaching the premarket low (PML) floor at 706.49. Ribbon stack is fully BEAR (fast 707.84, pivot 708.01, slow 708.61 inverted). Price is sandwiched 1.27 above the PML support and 3.45 below the PMH resistance. The battle level is 706.49 — if price holds on first test, bears maintain control and next target is the 5-day Carry support at 698.53 (-9.23 from here). If price reclaims above PMH 711.21, that reverses the gap and tests the 5-day Carry resistance 712.39. Asymmetry favors the downside given the bear ribbon and negative gap.

primary.condition: if SPY holds 706.49 on first test (does not break below PML)

secondary.condition: if SPY reclaims above 708.22 and retests PMH 711.21
secondary.entry_trigger: two-bar reversal above 711.21 + ribbon alignment shift

tertiary.condition: if SPY breaks below 706.49 immediately (no hold test)
tertiary.entry_trigger: gap-flush in progress, no support until 698.53 Carry

key_observations: Gap-down of -3.45 establishes a bearish overnight sentiment; PML at 706.49 is the critical first test of that commitment.
Bear ribbon stack (spread 77¢) is fully formed and inverted — bears have the structural advantage today.
Price at 707.76 is in the upper half of the premarket range, suggesting potential for a retest of 706.49 support (1.27 below) or a push toward the midpoint 708.85.
Multi-session Carry resistance at 712.39 is +4.63, requiring a reclaim of PMH 711.21 first — two hurdles for bulls to overcome.
The 5-day Carry support at 698.53 is the defined floor for bearish continuation; distance of -9.23 suggests a meaningful run if 706.49 breaks.
